title: hieracium chondrillifolium subsp. otenicum
intro: Hieracium chondrillifolium subsp. otenicum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium chondrillifolium subsp. otenicum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into infusions, salves, or ointments to utilize its medicinal properties.
